category_sources: source_facts.description says image manipulation; official Netpbm manual at https://netpbm.sourceforge.net/doc/ describes graphics programs and library for manipulating graphic images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is netpbm; official homepage https://netpbm.sourceforge.net/ uses Netpbm.
docs_sources: Official Netpbm user manual linked from the official homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is the official SourceForge SVN code URL https://svn.code.sf.net/p/netpbm/code/stable.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list many PBM/PGM/PPM/PAM converters; official manual describes command-shell graphics tools and format converters.
